---
title: "Analyzing US Births and Basketball Recruits"
author: "Alex Liu"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
```
```{r}
library(readxl)

nba_recruits <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx")
nba_recruits <- read_excel("data/nba_recruits.xlsx") %>%
  select(rank, nba_mean_ws48, top_mean_wa, total_seasons, drafted)

summary(nba_recruits)
```
